Drylining Contractors in Edinburgh

Expert drylining installation for homes and businesses across Edinburgh. Smooth finishes, fast turnaround, and quality you can trust.

Drylining is one of the most efficient ways to create smooth, modern interior walls and ceilings without the mess and drying time of traditional wet plastering. At Drylining Edinburgh, our experienced contractors install plasterboard to timber or metal stud frames, tape the joints, and finish the surface so it is ready for painting or wallpapering.

We work on projects of all sizes — from single-room residential renovations to multi-floor commercial fit-outs. Our team is CSCS accredited and carries £1 million public liability insurance, giving you complete confidence on every site.

What Our Drylining Service Includes

  • Site survey and measurement
  • Plasterboard cutting and fitting
  • Timber and metal stud frame construction
  • Professional taping and jointing
  • Corner bead and trim installation
  • Full cleanup and waste removal

Why Choose Our Drylining Contractors?

We understand that every project has its own timeline, budget, and quality expectations. That is why we tailor our approach to each client. Whether you are a homeowner renovating a kitchen in Leith or a project manager overseeing a new office build in the city centre, we deliver consistent, professional results with minimal disruption.

Get a Free Drylining Quote

Professional drylining and partition wall contractors serving Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, and Musselburgh. CSCS-accredited, fully insured, free quotes.
